title: Select All Customers
description: Write a query to select all columns from the customers table.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM customers;
hint: Use SELECT * to get all columns

title: Customer Names and Emails
description: Get full_name and email from all customers.
expectedQuery: SELECT full_name, email FROM customers;

title: Customers from New York
description: Find all customers from New York city.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE city = 'New York';

title: Products Under $100
description: Find all products with price less than 100.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price < 100;

title: Most Expensive Products First
description: List all products sorted by price from highest to lowest.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC;

title: First 5 Orders
description: Get the first 5 orders from the orders table.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM orders LIMIT 5;

title: Count Total Customers
description: Count the total number of customers.
expectedQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_customers FROM customers;

title: Unique Product Categories
description: List all unique product categories.
expectedQuery: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products;

title: Customers with Gmail
description: Find all customers whose email contains 'example.com'.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE email LIKE '%example.com';

title: Completed Orders
description: Find all orders with status 'completed'.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed';

title: Average Product Price
description: Calculate the average price of all products.
expectedQuery: SELECT AVG(price) AS average_price FROM products;

title: Orders Per Customer
description: Count how many orders each customer has placed.
expectedQuery: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id;

title: Total Revenue
description: Calculate total revenue from all payments.
expectedQuery: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM payments;

title: Products by Category Count
description: Count how many products exist in each category.
expectedQuery: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY category;

title: Customer Order Details
description: List customer names with their order IDs using a JOIN.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, o.order_id FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id;

title: Orders in January 2025
description: Find all orders placed in January 2025.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) = '2025-01';

title: Most Expensive Product
description: Find the product with the highest price.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1;

title: Customers Who Never Ordered
description: Find customers who have not placed any orders.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders);

title: Payment Methods Used
description: Count how many payments were made with each payment method.
expectedQuery: SELECT method, COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM payments GROUP BY method;

title: Average Order Value
description: Calculate the average payment amount per order.
expectedQuery: SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_order_value FROM payments;

title: Total Items Per Order
description: Calculate total quantity of items in each order.
expectedQuery: SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_items FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id;

title: Customers with Multiple Orders
description: Find customers who have placed more than 2 orders.
expectedQuery: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2;

title: Product Revenue
description: Calculate total revenue for each product (quantity × price).
expectedQuery: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_name;

title: Top 3 Customers by Spending
description: Find the top 3 customers who spent the most money.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, SUM(p.amount) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 3;

title: Orders Without Payment
description: Find orders that don't have a corresponding payment.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_id NOT IN (SELECT order_id FROM payments);

title: Best Selling Product
description: Find the product with the highest total quantity sold.
expectedQuery: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_sold FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 1;

title: Revenue by Category
description: Calculate total revenue for each product category.
expectedQuery: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS category_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category;

title: Customers and Their Cities
description: List all customers with orders, showing their city using LEFT JOIN.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, c.city, o.order_id FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id;
hint: Use LEFT JOIN to include all customers

title: Second Most Expensive Product
description: Find the product with the second highest price.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price = (SELECT MAX(price) FROM products WHERE price < (SELECT MAX(price) FROM products));

title: Orders Per Month
description: Count how many orders were placed each month.
expectedQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY month;

title: Average Items Per Order
description: Calculate the average number of items across all orders.
expectedQuery: SELECT AVG(total_items) AS avg_items FROM (SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_items FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id);

title: Products Never Ordered
description: Find products that have never been ordered.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM products WHERE product_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM order_items);

title: Customer Lifetime Value
description: Calculate total amount spent by each customer across all their orders.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, SUM(p.amount) AS lifetime_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id;

title: Cancelled Orders
description: Find all orders with status 'cancelled' and their customer names.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, o.order_id, o.order_date FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled';

title: Payment Method Revenue
description: Calculate total revenue collected through each payment method.
expectedQuery: SELECT method, SUM(amount) AS method_revenue FROM payments GROUP BY method;

title: Most Recent Order Per Customer
description: Find the most recent order date for each customer.
expectedQuery: SELECT customer_id, MAX(order_date) AS latest_order FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id;

title: Products Above Average Price
description: Find all products priced above the average product price.
expectedQuery: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products);

title: Order Details with Product Info
description: List all order items with product name and price.
expectedQuery: SELECT oi.order_id, p.product_name, p.price, oi.quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id;

title: Revenue by City
description: Calculate total revenue from customers in each city.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.city, SUM(p.amount) AS city_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY c.city;

title: Pending Orders Value
description: Calculate the total value of all pending orders by joining with order items.
expectedQuery: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS pending_value FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'pending';

title: Customer Order Frequency
description: Find customers and count their total orders, ordered by frequency.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id ORDER BY order_count DESC;
hint: Use LEFT JOIN to include all customers

title: Monthly Revenue Trend
description: Calculate total revenue for each month.
expectedQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', payment_date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS monthly_revenue FROM payments GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

title: Low Stock Alert
description: This challenge cannot be completed as the products table doesn't have a stock column. Try another challenge!
expectedQuery: SELECT 'Schema does not support this query' AS note;

title: Customer Order Summary
description: Create a summary showing customer name, total orders, and total spent.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS total_spent FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id;

title: Top Product by Revenue
description: Find which product generated the most revenue overall.
expectedQuery: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1;

title: Orders with Multiple Items
description: Find orders that contain more than one type of product.
expectedQuery: SELECT order_id, COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS product_types FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) > 1;

title: Payment Conversion Rate
description: Calculate what percentage of orders have been paid.
expectedQuery: SELECT ROUND((CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.order_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id)) * 100, 2) AS payment_rate FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id;
hint: Divide paid orders by total orders

title: Customer Cohort by Month
description: Group customers by the month they were created.
expectedQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) AS cohort_month, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY cohort_month;

title: Average Order Processing Time
description: Calculate average days between order date and payment date.
expectedQuery: SELECT AVG(julianday(p.payment_date) - julianday(o.order_date)) AS avg_processing_days FROM orders o JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id;

title: Complete Customer Profile
description: Create a complete profile: customer info, order count, total spent, and latest order.
expectedQuery: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, c.city, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orders, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS spent, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY c.customer_id;
